entries.title: Iron Man
entries.writer: Mark Fergus, Hawk Ostby, Art Marcum, Matt Holloway
entries.synopsis: When wealthy industrialist Tony Stark is forced to build an armored suit after a life-threatening incident in a war zone, he ultimately decides to use its technology to fight against evil. The film that launched the Marvel Cinematic Universe.

entries.title: The Incredible Hulk
entries.synopsis: Bruce Banner, a scientist on the run from the U.S. Government, must find a cure for the monster he turns into whenever he loses his temper, before General Ross and a new Abomination destroy him.

entries.title: Iron Man 2
entries.synopsis: With the world now aware of his identity as Iron Man, Tony Stark must contend with both his declining health and a vengeful mad scientist who threatens to destroy his legacy.

entries.title: Thor
entries.writer: Ashley Miller, Zack Stentz, Don Payne
entries.synopsis: The powerful but arrogant god Thor is cast out of Asgard to live amongst humans in Midgard (Earth), where he soon becomes one of their finest defenders.

entries.title: Captain America: The First Avenger
entries.synopsis: Steve Rogers, a rejected military soldier, transforms into Captain America after taking a dose of a super-soldier serum. But being Captain America comes at a price as he attempts to take down a ruthless organization.

entries.title: The Avengers
entries.synopsis: Nick Fury of S.H.I.E.L.D. brings together a team of superheroes to save the planet from Loki and his alien army.

entries.title: Iron Man 3
entries.synopsis: When Tony Stark's world is torn apart by a formidable terrorist called the Mandarin, he starts an investigation and finds his way back to his heroic destiny.

entries.title: Thor: The Dark World
entries.writer: Christopher Yost, Christopher Markus, Stephen McFeely
entries.synopsis: When Jane Foster is possessed by an ancient weapon called the Aether, Thor must protect her while fighting the ruthless dark elf Malekith.

entries.title: Captain America: The Winter Soldier
entries.synopsis: As Steve Rogers struggles to embrace his role in the modern world, he teams up with a fellow Avenger and S.H.I.E.L.D agent, Black Widow, to battle a new threat from history: an assassin known as the Winter Soldier.

entries.title: Guardians of the Galaxy
entries.synopsis: A group of intergalactic criminals must pull together to stop a fanatical warrior with plans to purge the universe.

entries.title: Avengers: Age of Ultron
entries.synopsis: When Tony Stark and Bruce Banner try to jump-start a dormant peacekeeping program called Ultron, things go horribly wrong and it's up to the Avengers to stop the villainous Ultron from enacting his terrible plans.

entries.title: Ant-Man
entries.writer: Edgar Wright, Joe Cornish, Adam McKay, Paul Rudd
entries.synopsis: Armed with a super-suit with the astonishing ability to shrink in scale but increase in strength, cat burglar Scott Lang must embrace his inner hero and help his mentor, Dr. Hank Pym, protect the secret behind his spectacular Ant-Man suit from a new generation of towering threats.

entries.title: Captain America: Civil War
entries.synopsis: Political pressure mounts to install a system of accountability when the actions of the Avengers lead to collateral damage. The new status quo deeply divides members of the team.

entries.title: Doctor Strange
entries.writer: Jon Spaihts, Scott Derrickson, C. Robert Cargill
entries.synopsis: While on a journey of physical and spiritual healing, a brilliant neurosurgeon is drawn into the world of the mystic arts.

entries.title: Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2
entries.synopsis: The Guardians struggle to keep together as a team while dealing with their personal family issues, notably Star-Lord's encounter with his father the ambitious celestial being Ego.

entries.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
entries.writer: Jonathan Goldstein, John Francis Daley, Jon Watts, Christopher Ford, Chris McKenna, Erik Sommers
entries.synopsis: Peter Parker balances his life as an ordinary high school student in Queens with his superhero alter-ego Spider-Man, and finds himself on the trail of a new menace prowling the skies of New York City.

entries.title: Thor: Ragnarok
entries.writer: Eric Pearson, Craig Kyle, Christopher Yost
entries.synopsis: Imprisoned on the planet Sakaar, Thor must race against time to return to Asgard and stop Ragnarök, the destruction of his world, at the hands of the powerful and ruthless villain Hela.

entries.title: Black Panther
entries.synopsis: T'Challa, heir to the hidden but advanced kingdom of Wakanda, must step forward to lead his people into a new future and must confront a challenger from his country's past.

entries.title: Avengers: Infinity War
entries.synopsis: The Avengers and their allies must be willing to sacrifice all in an attempt to defeat the powerful Thanos before his blitz of devastation and ruin puts an end to the universe.

entries.title: Ant-Man and the Wasp
entries.writer: Chris McKenna, Erik Sommers, Paul Rudd, Andrew Barrer, Gabriel Ferrari
entries.synopsis: As Scott Lang balances being both a superhero and a father, Hope van Dyne and Dr. Hank Pym present an urgent new mission that finds the Ant-Man fighting alongside The Wasp to uncover secrets from their past.

entries.title: Captain Marvel
entries.writer: Anna Boden, Ryan Fleck, Geneva Robertson-Dworet
entries.synopsis: Carol Danvers becomes one of the universe's most powerful heroes when Earth is caught in the middle of a galactic war between two alien races.

entries.title: Avengers: Endgame
entries.synopsis: After the devastating events of Avengers: Infinity War, the universe is in ruins. With the help of remaining allies, the Avengers assemble once more in order to reverse Thanos' actions and restore balance to the universe.

entries.title: Spider-Man: Far From Home
entries.synopsis: Following the events of Avengers: Endgame, Spider-Man must step up to take on new threats in a world that has changed forever, as he goes on a school trip to Europe.

entries.title: WandaVision
entries.synopsis: Wanda Maximoff and Vision—two super-powered beings living idealized suburban lives—begin to suspect that everything is not as it seems.

entries.title: The Falcon and the Winter Soldier
entries.synopsis: Following the events of Avengers: Endgame, Sam Wilson and Bucky Barnes team up in a global adventure that tests their abilities—and their patience.

entries.title: Loki: Season 1
entries.synopsis: The mercurial villain Loki resumes his role as the God of Mischief after being apprehended by the Time Variance Authority, a bureaucratic organization that monitors the timeline.

entries.title: Black Widow
entries.synopsis: Natasha Romanoff, on the run after the events of Captain America: Civil War, confronts the darker parts of her ledger when a dangerous conspiracy with ties to her past arises. She must reunite with her makeshift family of Red Room operatives to take down the Taskmaster.

entries.title: What If...?: Season 1
entries.synopsis: An animated anthology exploring alternate histories of the MCU, featuring The Watcher as narrator guiding viewers through pivotal moments reimagined.

entries.title: Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings
entries.writer: Dave Callaham, Destin Daniel Cretton, Andrew Lanham
entries.synopsis: Shang-Chi, the master of weaponry-based Kung Fu, is forced to confront the past he thought he left behind when he is drawn into the web of the mysterious Ten Rings organization.

entries.title: Eternals
entries.writer: Chloé Zhao, Patrick Burleigh, Ryan Firpo, Kaz Firpo
entries.synopsis: The saga of the Eternals, a race of immortal beings who lived on Earth and shaped its history and civilizations, comes to an end as they reunite to protect humanity from their evil counterparts, the Deviants.

entries.title: Hawkeye
entries.synopsis: Former Avenger Clint Barton has a seemingly simple mission: get back to his family for Christmas. Possible? Maybe with the help of Kate Bishop, a 22-year-old archer with dreams of becoming a superhero.

entries.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
entries.synopsis: With Spider-Man's identity now revealed, Peter asks Doctor Strange for help. When a spell goes wrong, dangerous foes from other worlds start to appear, forcing Peter to discover what it truly means to be Spider-Man.

entries.title: Moon Knight
entries.director: Mohamed Diab, Justin Benson, Aaron Moorhead
entries.synopsis: Steven Grant, a mild-mannered gift-shop employee, becomes entangled in a deadly mystery involving Egyptian gods. He soon discovers he has dissociative identity disorder and shares a body with mercenary Marc Spector.

cast.character: Marc Spector / Steven Grant / Moon Knight

entries.title: Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness
entries.synopsis: Doctor Strange teams with a mysterious new ally who traverses the Multiverse to face a powerful new adversary. The Scarlet Witch begins a terrifying rampage across the multiverse.

entries.title: Ms. Marvel
entries.director: Adil El Arbi, Bilall Fallah, Meera Menon, Sharmeen Obaid-Chinoy
entries.synopsis: An ordinary girl who has an extraordinary gift, Kamala Khan – a Pakistani-American from Jersey City – is a huge fan of the Avengers, especially Captain Marvel. A great student, an avid gamer, and a voracious fan-fiction scribe, she struggles to fit in at home and at school. Then she gets superpowers like the heroes she's always looked up to.

entries.title: Thor: Love and Thunder
entries.synopsis: Thor embarks on a journey unlike anything he's ever faced – a quest for inner peace. But his retirement is interrupted by a galactic killer known as Gorr the God Butcher, who seeks the extinction of the gods.

entries.title: I Am Groot: Season 1
entries.synopsis: The first collection of original short stories featuring Baby Groot getting into mischief across the galaxy.

entries.title: She-Hulk: Attorney at Law
entries.synopsis: Jennifer Walters navigates the complicated life of a superhero lawyer, who also happens to be a 6-foot-7-inch green superpowered hulk.

entries.title: Werewolf by Night
entries.synopsis: A secret group of monster hunters gather at a spooky mansion following the death of their leader, unaware that one of their own is a monster.

entries.title: Black Panther: Wakanda Forever
entries.synopsis: The people of Wakanda fight to protect their home from intervening world powers as they mourn the death of King T'Challa. Queen Ramonda, Shuri, M'Baku, Okoye and the Dora Milaje must band together with War Dog Nakia and Everett Ross to forge a new path for the kingdom of Wakanda.

entries.title: Guardians of the Galaxy Holiday Special
entries.synopsis: On a mission to cheer up their leader, Drax and Mantis embark on an unexpected holiday adventure to Earth to find the perfect Christmas present for Peter Quill.

entries.title: Ant-Man and the Wasp: Quantumania
entries.synopsis: Scott Lang and Hope Van Dyne, along with Hank Pym and Janet Van Dyne, explore the Quantum Realm, where they interact with strange new creatures and embark on an adventure that pushes them beyond the limits of what they thought was possible.

entries.title: Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3
entries.synopsis: Still reeling from the loss of Gamora, Peter Quill rallies his team to defend the universe and one of their own – a mission that could mean the end of the Guardians if not successful.

entries.title: Secret Invasion
entries.synopsis: Nick Fury and Talos discover a faction of shapeshifting Skrulls who have been infiltrating the highest levels of government on Earth for years.

entries.title: I Am Groot: Season 2
entries.synopsis: The second collection of original short stories featuring Baby Groot in brand new misadventures across the galaxy.

entries.title: Loki: Season 2
entries.synopsis: Loki finds himself in a battle for the soul of the TVA as he and his allies race to prevent the collapse of the timeline, with Loki wielding a remarkable new time-slip ability.

entries.title: The Marvels
entries.synopsis: Carol Danvers, Kamala Khan, and Monica Rambeau find their powers entangled and must work together to save the universe.

entries.title: What If...?: Season 2
entries.synopsis: The second animated anthology season explores more alternate MCU timelines including a 1602 version, an Asgard-ruled Earth, and Kahhori, a new Indigenous hero.

entries.title: Echo
entries.synopsis: Maya Lopez, aka Echo, must face her past, reconnect with her Native American roots and embrace the meaning of family and community if she ever hopes to move forward.

entries.title: Agatha All Along
entries.synopsis: Agatha Harkness finds herself powerless after a snarky teen helps free her from a manipulative spell. Her only hope is to assemble a new coven and lead them down the Witches' Road.

entries.title: What If...?: Season 3
entries.synopsis: The final season of the animated anthology explores the multiverse with an epic crossover story weaving together characters from across multiple alternate timelines.

entries.title: Your Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man
entries.synopsis: An animated series set in the MCU following a young Peter Parker as he finds his footing as Spider-Man, under the unique mentorship of Norman Osborn.

entries.title: Captain America: Brave New World
entries.synopsis: Sam Wilson, the new Captain America, navigates a complex political landscape involving the President of the United States and a new Red Hulk threat.

entries.title: Daredevil: Born Again
entries.director: Justin Benson, Aaron Moorhead, Michael Cuesta, David Boyd
entries.synopsis: Matt Murdock / Daredevil and Wilson Fisk / Kingpin continue their complicated relationship in New York City, with Fisk running for mayor while Murdock defends the innocent in the courtroom.

entries.title: Thunderbolts*
entries.synopsis: A team of antiheroes and reformed villains assembled by Valentina Allegra de Fontaine is sent on a dangerous mission that forces them to confront their pasts and possibly unite as something greater.

entries.title: Ironheart
entries.synopsis: Riri Williams, a genius inventor who creates the most advanced suit of armor since Iron Man, returns to her hometown of Chicago where she must navigate dangerous forces that combine the streets and the supernatural.

entries.title: The Fantastic Four: First Steps
entries.writer: Josh Friedman, Jeff Kaplan, Ian Springer
entries.synopsis: Marvel's First Family—Reed Richards, Sue Storm, Johnny Storm, and Ben Grimm—step into the spotlight. Set against the vibrant backdrop of a retro-futuristic 1960s, the Fantastic Four must save the world from Galactus, the Devourer of Worlds.

entries.title: Eyes of Wakanda
entries.synopsis: An animated anthology series exploring the history of Wakandan War Dogs throughout history, from ancient times to the modern era, as they recover stolen Vibranium.

entries.title: Avengers: Doomsday
entries.synopsis: The Avengers face Doctor Doom, the ruler of Latveria, whose ruthless intelligence and near-omnipotent powers threaten the entire multiverse. Robert Downey Jr. returns as Doctor Doom.

entries.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day
entries.synopsis: The next chapter in the MCU Spider-Man saga, following the events of No Way Home. Peter Parker starts fresh in a world where no one remembers who he is.

entries.title: Blade
entries.synopsis: Eric Brooks, a half-human, half-vampire Dhampir known as Blade, uses his unique abilities to hunt down vampires that threaten humanity.

entries.title: Avengers: Secret Wars
entries.synopsis: The culmination of the Multiverse Saga. Following the events of Avengers: Doomsday, heroes and villains from across the multiverse are brought together on Battleworld for the ultimate conflict.
